comments: Open-source tool built by an independent accessibility researcher. GitHub repository available. Also available as a Figma plugin for design workflow integration.
features: Ally - Smart Color Contrast Checker validates foreground and background colour combinations against WCAG 2.1 AA and AAA standards. It goes beyond pass/fail by guaranteeing five alternative colour suggestions that always meet the required contrast ratio. Free, open-source, no login required.
title: Ally - Smart Color Contrast Checker
